title: 2024625Dry 87W49 B6S86
summary:
Main
· Freight Futures Volatility Drops to 5-Year Lows as Spot Rates Remain Rangebound - Volatility has all but disappeared in the usually highly volatile freight futures market, as spot rates have remained relatively steady and any tightness or slackness in the tonnage supply have so far appeared temporary in nature. Although spot rates are still at healthy and mostly profitable levels, the lack of volatility is a worrisome sign , in our view. After all, if everyone feels comfortable with the current conference rates, the risk of a potential "vacuum" in the market balance could remain overlooked and lead to a mini panic if hedgers keep increasing gross risk exposure due to a lower implied volatility.
